tables.Description:
2018-2020: Front lumbar support
2021-2026: Seat electronics, front seats
Steering column lock, automatic transmission selector lever

2018-2020: Radio receiver, parking heater, climate control system controls
2021-2026: Auxiliary heating, climate control system control panel, tire pressure monitoring system
Headlight range control, interior monitoring, ambient lighting, light switch, roof module, emergency call system, parking brake, diagnostic connector, light/rain sensor, particulate matter sensor

2018-2021: Driver's side safety belt tensioner 
2022-2026: Belt tensioners (driver's side), airbag control unit

2018-2019: Cell phone booster; 
2020: MMI Infotainment system control module 
2021-2022: Audi phone box 
2023-2026: Audi phone box, electronic toll collection system (ETC)

2018-2020: Instrument cluster
2021-2026: Instrument cluster, emergency call module

2018-2021: Vehicle opening/start (NFC) 
2022-2026: Control unit for convenience access and start authorisation
Driver side door control module, left rear window regulator motor, left rear door control module
Roof module, vehicle electrical system control module

2018-2021: Auxiliary battery control module
2022-2024: 48 volt battery, electric drive system 
2025-2026: 48 V battery
Driver assistance systems (Parking system, side assist, adaptive cruise assist, camera)

2018-2020: Passenger occupant detection system, front seat ventilation, headliner interior light
2021-2026: Front passenger’s seat electronics, roof electronics control module

2018-2020: A/C system components, parking brake, reverse lights
2021-2026: A/C system components, parking brake, reverse lights, interior sound generator

2018-2020: A/C system components, diagnostic connector, instrument panel control, rearview mirror
2021-2026: A/C system components, diagnostic connector, center console switch module, rearview mirror, headlight range control, instrument ilumination
Right rear window regulator motor, front passenger side door control module, right rear door control module

2022-2024: Engine start, clutch position sensor, electric drive system 
2025-2026: Engine start, clutch position sensor

2021: Engine control module 
2022-2026: Drive system control module

2018-2020: Engine components, ignition coils
2021-2025: Engine components

2018-2020: Auxiliary heating, engine components
2021: Auxiliary heating, brake system vacuum pump

2018-2021: Engine components, ignition coils
2022-2024: Engine components, engine electronics, on-board charger, power electronics 
2025-2026: Engine components, engine electronics

2018-2020: Battery control module
2021-2026: Battery monitoring control module, diagnostic interface
Anti-theft alarm system, garage door opener

2018-2020: Engine components
2021: Engine components, fuel injectors 
2022-2024: Engine components, fuel injectors, electric drive system 
2025-2026: Engine components, fuel injectors
